codeSystems.name: SNOMEDCTBodyStructures
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT Body Structures
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all codes from [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) where concept is-a 442083009 (Anatomical or acquired body site (body structure)).
codeSystems.StructureDefinition-ach-monthly-observat: ACH Monthly Event Observation - Vital Signs

codeSystems.name: DeviceType
codeSystems.title: Device Type
codeSystems.description: Codes used to identify medical devices. Includes concepts from SNOMED CT (http://www.snomed.org/) where concept is-a 49062001 (Device)  and is provided as a suggestive example.

codeSystems.name: DiagnosticServiceSectionCodes
codeSystems.title: Diagnostic Service Section Codes
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all the codes in HL7 V2 table 0074.
codeSystems.StructureDefinition-ach-monthly-diagnost: ACH Monthly Event General Diagnostic Report

codeSystems.name: Diet
codeSystems.title: Diet
codeSystems.description: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate dietary preferences or restrictions a patient may have.

codeSystems.name: DischargeDisposition
codeSystems.title: Discharge disposition
codeSystems.description: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to where the patient left the hospital.

codeSystems.name: LocationType
codeSystems.title: Location type
codeSystems.description: This example value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the physical form of the Location.

codeSystems.name: MedicationAdministration Category Codes
codeSystems.title: Medication administration  category  codes
codeSystems.description: MedicationAdministration Category Codes

codeSystems.name: SNOMEDCTFormCodes
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT Form Codes
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all dose form codes from SNOMED CT - provided as an exemplar.

codeSystems.name: medicationRequest Category Codes
codeSystems.title: Medication request  category  codes
codeSystems.description: MedicationRequest Category Codes

codeSystems.name: medicationRequest Status Reason Codes
codeSystems.title: Medication request  status  reason  codes
codeSystems.description: MedicationRequest Status Reason Codes

codeSystems.name: LOINCCodes
codeSystems.title: LOINC Codes
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all LOINC codes
codeSystems.StructureDefinition-ach-daily-observatio: ACH Daily Event Lab Result Observation
codeSystems.StructureDefinition-ach-monthly-observat: ACH Monthly Event Lab Result Observation

codeSystems.name: ObservationMethods
codeSystems.title: Observation Methods
codeSystems.description: Observation Method codes from [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) where concept is-a 272394005 (Technique (qualifier value)) or is-a 129264002 (Action (qualifier value)) or is-a 386053000 (Evaluation procedure(procedure))
codeSystems.StructureDefinition-ach-daily-observatio: ACH Daily Event Lab Result Observation
codeSystems.StructureDefinition-ach-monthly-observat: ACH Monthly Event Observation - Vital Signs
ACH Monthly Event Lab Result Observation

codeSystems.name: VitalSigns
codeSystems.title: Vital Signs
codeSystems.description: This value set indicates the allowed vital sign result types.   The LOINC code for Vitals Signs panel (85353-1) is a grouping structure for a set of vital signs and includes related links (with type=has-member) to the Observations in this set (e.g. respiratory rate, heart rate, BP).  The Blood pressure panel (85354-9) is used to group the component observations Systolic blood pressure (8480-6) and Diastolic blood pressure (8462-4).
codeSystems.StructureDefinition-ach-monthly-observat: ACH Monthly Event Observation - Vital Signs

codeSystems.name: ProcedureCodes(SNOMEDCT)
codeSystems.title: Procedure Codes (SNOMED CT)
codeSystems.description: Procedure Code: All SNOMED CT procedure codes.

codeSystems.name: ProcedureReasonCodes
codeSystems.title: Procedure Reason Codes
codeSystems.description: This example value set defines the set of codes that can be used to indicate a reason for a procedure.

codeSystems.name: SNOMEDCTReasonMedicationNotGivenCodes
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT Reason Medication Not Given Codes
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all medication refused, medication not administered, and non-administration of necessary drug or medicine codes from SNOMED CT - provided as an exemplar value set.

codeSystems.name: LOINCDiagnosticReportCodes
codeSystems.title: LOINC Diagnostic Report Codes
codeSystems.description: This value set includes LOINC codes that relate to Diagnostic Observations.
codeSystems.StructureDefinition-ach-monthly-diagnost: ACH Monthly Event General Diagnostic Report

codeSystems.name: SNOMEDCTRouteCodes
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT Route Codes
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all Route codes from SNOMED CT - provided as an exemplar.

codeSystems.name: ServiceRequestCategoryCodes
codeSystems.title: Service Request Category Codes
codeSystems.description: An example value set of SNOMED CT concepts that can classify a requested service

codeSystems.name: USCoreDiagnosticReportCategory
codeSystems.title: US Core DiagnosticReport Category
codeSystems.description: The US Core Diagnostic Report Category Value Set is a 'starter set' of categories supported for fetching and Diagnostic Reports and notes.
codeSystems.StructureDefinition-ach-monthly-diagnost: ACH Monthly Event Diagnostic Report - Report and Note

codeSystems.name: USCoreMedicationCodes
codeSystems.title: US Core Medication Codes (RxNorm)
codeSystems.description: All prescribable medication formulations represented using  either a 'generic' or 'brand-specific' concept. This includes RxNorm codes whose Term Type is SCD (semantic clinical drug), SBD (semantic brand drug), GPCK (generic pack), BPCK (brand pack), SCDG (semantic clinical drug group), SBDG (semantic brand drug group), SCDF (semantic clinical drug form), or SBDF (semantic brand drug form)

codeSystems.name: Hl7VSReAdmissionIndicator
codeSystems.title: hl7VS-re-admissionIndicator
codeSystems.description: Value Set of codes which are used to specify that a patient is being re-admitted to a healthcare facility from which they were discharged, and indicates the circumstances around such re-admission.

codeSystems.name: ServiceDeliveryLocationRoleType
codeSystems.title: ServiceDeliveryLocationRoleType
codeSystems.description: A role of a place that further classifies the setting (e.g., accident site, road side, work site, community location) in which services are delivered.

codeSystems.name: AcuteCareHospitalDailyEventDiagnosticReportStatus
codeSystems.title: ACH Daily Diagnostic Report Status ValueSet
codeSystems.description: A set of codes indicating the status of the diagnostic report.

codeSystems.name: AcuteCareHospitalDailyEventEncounterClass
codeSystems.title: ACH Daily Encounter Class ValueSet
codeSystems.description: A set of codes indicating the encounter class that represent inpatient, observation and short stay concepts.

codeSystems.name: AcuteCareHospitalDailyEncounterStatus
codeSystems.title: ACH Daily Encounter Status ValueSet
codeSystems.description: A set of codes indicating the status of the encounter.

codeSystems.name: AcuteCareHospitalMonthlyEncounterClass
codeSystems.title: ACH Monthly Encounter Class ValueSet
codeSystems.description: A set of codes indicating the encounter class that represent inpatient, emergency, observation and short stay concepts.

codeSystems.name: AcuteCareHospitalMonthlyEncounterStatus
codeSystems.title: ACH Monthly Encounter Status ValueSet
codeSystems.description: A set of codes indicating the status of the encounter.
